Asset.title: Asset
Asset.description: Represents an industrial vehicle/logistics asset up for auction.

AdminUser.title: AdminUser
AdminUser.description: Represents an administrative user who can manage assets and users.

Brand.title: Brand
Brand.description: Represents a brand name used for assets filtering and dropdown selection.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a category name used for assets classification.

Condition.title: Condition
Condition.description: Represents a physical condition name used for assets description.

RegisteredUser.title: RegisteredUser
RegisteredUser.description: Represents an external client who can log in to view prices and place bids.

/assets/{assetId}.description: Collection of logistics assets open for public catalog viewing and bidding.

/admins/{adminEmail}.description: Collection of authorized administrator user details.

/brands/{brandId}.description: Collection of master brands for assets selection.

/categories/{categoryId}.description: Collection of master categories for assets selection.

/conditions/{conditionId}.description: Collection of master physical conditions for assets selection.

/registered_users/{email}.description: Collection of registered external user accounts with verification status.
